requirements.note: v3: Added STORY 13 (Multi-tab Comparison), STORY 14 (KB Quality), STORY 15 (KB Tags). Updated STORY 7 with impersonation. 15 stories total.

specification.note: v5: UC-14 updated — PortalInstance architecture (independent components per tab, display:none pattern, own sidebar 200px + content). Replaces old TenantTab shared-content approach.

design.note: v5 (2.1): PortalInstance component spec added (props: permissions, username, isActive, impersonateUserId). Removed old shared-content TenantTab architecture. Display:none pattern, independent graph instances per tab.

test_planning.note: v4: Updated test counts — E2E-UI 59 (was 28), E2E-API 61 (was 43), IT 28, multi-tenant 34. Total 210 test cases. PortalInstance architecture validated.

implementation.note: Final: PortalInstance architecture implemented. 59/59 E2E-UI, 61/61 E2E-API, 28/28 integration, 34/34 multi-tenant tests pass. Independent graph instances per tab, display:none switching.

user_guide.note: v5: Updated multi-tab comparison section — PortalInstance architecture, display:none pattern, independent state per tab.

testing.note: 182 total tests pass: 59 E2E-UI + 61 E2E-API + 28 integration + 34 multi-tenant. All Playwright.

deployment.note: v2: Express->Hono, Vite->CDN SPA, src/admin/->routes/admin.ts in DPG+RLN

changes: STORY 4 (Analytics): Fixed table reference entries→knowledge_entries (71,982 real entries). Embedding viz uses real 384-dim vectors from knowledge_vectors (32,391 vectors).
STORY 9 (Search): Replaced LIKE matching with TF-IDF scoring. Score breakdown: similarity (TF-IDF normalized), keyword (title/source bonus), recency (7d/30d boost), quality (entry quality_score).
All functions updated: searchKbEntries, getKbEmbeddings, getKbEntryById, getKbEntryCount, getKbEntries
Route updated: admin.ts search endpoint uses real score breakdown from searchKbEntries

cascadeUpdate.trigger: Architecture migration: Express->Hono, dual-port->single-port, Vite SPA->Babel CDN SPA
changes: SPA: Vite build -> React 18 + Babel standalone CDN (single HTML file)
Testing: supertest -> Hono app.request() native testing
Frontend deps: Axios/React Query/Zustand -> fetch()/useState (no build)

finalImplementation.summary: PortalInstance architecture for multi-tab comparison. Each tab = independent component with own sidebar (200px) + content area, display:none when inactive. 182 tests pass.

architectureChange.old: TenantTab shared content area, switch tabs = switch props, shared graph state, shared camera (broken)
architectureChange.new: PortalInstance independent component with own sidebar + content, rendered in parallel, display:none when inactive
